overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a Jedi character with a yellow lightsaber exploring industrial maintenance corridors, a vast spaceship hangar, and entering a starship interior. The environment features sci-fi industrial architecture with massive pipes, metal walkways, and dramatic artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with overhead pipes and metal walkways

events.description: approaching large illuminated wall with glowing cyan alien symbols
character stops walking and looks upward at the towering industrial structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated industrial walkway, examining surroundings and looking up at large pipes and metal frameworks

entered.detail: elevated metal grated walkway with safety railings
metal safety barriers along the walkway edge
massive cylindrical industrial pipe running diagonally overhead
metal support beams and framework structure
large translucent wall with illuminated alien writing

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow elevated industrial walkway surrounded by massive metal pipes and support trusses. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting. As the character progresses, they approach a large wall featuring glowing cyan alien symbols, eventually stopping to look up at the towering industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: large spaceship hangar with industrial architecture and circular ceiling structures

events.description: scene transitions to vast hangar containing a large parked spaceship
character walks up the entry ramp into the spaceship

agents.ego_description: walking across the hangar floor toward the spaceship, then circling around the hull to reach the entry ramp

notable_agents.action: large weathered spaceship parked in hangar with landing gear deployed

entered.detail: large weathered spaceship with dark hull and visible battle damage
wide metallic floor with red and white geometric markings
tall industrial walls with platforms and machinery
large circular mechanical structure on ceiling with red indicator lights
extended entry ramp leading into the spaceship

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast industrial hangar housing a large weathered spaceship. The character walks across the marked hangar floor, circles around the parked vessel, and approaches the entry ramp. The hangar features towering walls and a massive circular mechanical structure on the ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship interior cockpit and common area with crew quarters

events.description: entering the spaceship interior through the main entry ramp

agents.ego_description: walking into the spaceship interior, looking around the cockpit area and greeting crew members

notable_agents.action: small alien crew member in blue outfit standing near storage containers
human crew member in dark clothing walking in the background

entered.detail: circular control panels with illuminated buttons and screens
brown leather bench seating along the wall
circular table with glowing blue holographic interface
wall-mounted metal storage lockers and shelves

segments.scene_description: The character enters the spaceship interior through the main ramp, revealing a compact cockpit area with holographic displays and leather seating. Inside, crew members are present including a small alien in blue clothing. The environment features metallic walls, storage compartments, and illuminated control panels.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast hangar and finally into the intimate interior of a starship. It begins with the character traversing a narrow elevated walkway surrounded by massive metal pipes and dim artificial lighting, moving toward a wall etched with glowing cyan alien symbols. As the character steps forward, the space suddenly expands into a towering industrial hangar where they walk across a marked floor and circle a weathered spaceship beneath a massive circular ceiling structure. The scene then shifts as the character ascends the entry ramp, transitioning from the cavernous hangar into a compact cockpit filled with holographic displays and leather seating. Finally, the camera settles within the metallic interior, revealing illuminated control panels and crew members, including a small alien in blue clothing.
